mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_LIKE WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE BT_LEARNING SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT + 1 WHERE IDX = #{idx}
UPDATE LEARN_LIKE SET LIKE_AVAILABLE = 1 WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT LIKE_AVAILABLE FROM LEARN_LIKE WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.delete: UPDATE BT_LEARNING SET LIKE_COUNT = LIKE_COUNT -1 WHERE IDX = #{idx}
DELETE FROM LEARN_LIKE WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE LEARN_LIKE SET LIKE_AVAILABLE = 0 WHERE IDX = #{idx} AND USERNAME = #{username}
